calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-25-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Dept. 501 for a prove up hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Leslie Nichols; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; CSR: Mitch Lyon #6840.

William Lynn, Esq. for the Plaintiff: Real Management Company.
Plaintiff's Witness John Fedele was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant Brian Johnson.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at: 945 Larking St., #2, San Francisco. CA 94109.
Rental Agreement is canceled, and Lease is forfeited.
Past-due rent - $815.00
Holdover Damages - $3,920.00
Waived Costs.
Total - $4,735.00
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Sep-25-2017 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-20-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Jason Jungreis, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Real Management Company is present. Represented by J.J. Panzer.
Attorney William Lynn for the plaintiff.
Defendant Brian Johnson is NOT present.

Plaintiff released by JPT at 2:05pm.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of September 25, 2017 remains on calendar. (501)
